import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Zap, Heart, CheckCircle, TrendingUp, Clock, Star, ChevronRight, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'; import './styles/DashboardHome.css'; const DashboardHome = () => { const [user, setUser] = useState({ name: 'Explorer' }); useEffect(() => { const storedUser = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user')); if (storedUser) setUser(storedUser); }, []); const stats = [ { label: "Total Trials", value: "128", icon: , color: "pink" }, { label: "Saved Looks", value: "42", icon: , color: "purple" }, { label: "Perfect Fits", value: "12", icon: , color: "blue" }, { label: "Style Score", value: "85%", icon: , color: "yellow" } ]; return (
{/* 1. WELCOME HEADER */}

Hello, {user.name} ✨

Your AI Style Engine is primed. What are we wearing today?

{/* 2. STATS GRID */}
{stats.map((stat, i) => (
{stat.icon}

{stat.value}

{stat.label}

))}
{/* 3. BENTO GRID CONTENT */}
{/* Recently Tried */}

Recently Tried

{[1, 2, 3].map(i => (
Urban Streetwear Set

98% Fit Match

))}
{/* AI Trends */}

AI Trends For You

Cyberpunk Minimalism

Based on your recent skin tone analysis.

{/* Recommended Section */}

Recommended

Evening Blazer
Silk Midi Dress
); }; export default DashboardHome;
